data.summary: AV is a leading manufacturer of Unmanned Aircraft Systems, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles, Loitering Munition Systems, Unmanned Ground Vehicles used for surveillance and reconnaissance by the United States Military, U. AV also manufactures High-Altitude Pseudo-Satellites.
data.text:
AV is a leading manufacturer of Unmanned Aircraft Systems, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles, Loitering Munition Systems, Unmanned Ground Vehicles used for surveillance and reconnaissance by the United States Military, U.S. allies and Commercial Industries. AV also manufactures High-Altitude Pseudo-Satellites. AV Introduces Mayhem 10: Multi-Role Launched Effects System Integrated all-domain battle-tested solutions for today’s battlefield. Where Proven Systems Meet the Future of Defense Autonomous Systems & Solutions MacCready Works Built to Make the Rules of the Battlefield AV_Halo Unified Software Platform for Next-Gen Operational Advantage Some missions stay classified. These headlines don’t. Questions or Comments Products & Systems Founded by Dr. Paul MacCready in 1971, AV is a global leader in intelligent, multi-mission autonomous robotic systems. Serving defense, government and commercial customers, AV provides technology solutions at the intersection of robotics, sensors, AI, software analytics and connectivity. Our Mission Inventing Advantage Our Approach The Way We Work Wins Wars Our Team Leadership Board of Directors Charles Thomas Burbage Admiral Phil S. Davidson Honorable Mary Beth Long Edward R. Muller General Joseph L. Votel David C. Wodlinger AV's Management Team is lead by CEO Wahid Nawabi. Other upper-management team members include Kevin McDonnell, Trace Stevenson, Trip Ferguson, Jeff Rodrian, James Jenkins, Brian Morrison, and Mary Clum. Wahid

Albers, Charles Thomas Burbage, Admiral Phil S. Davidson, Cindy Lewis, Honorable Mary Beth Long, Edward R. Muller, Stephen F. Page,  General Joseph L. Votel and David C. Wodlinger.                                     Votel AV’s Strategic Advisory Group (SAG) is chartered to provide executive-level advice to its senior leaders on all matters relating to the U.S. Department of Defense. SAG members are highly qualified former members of the U.S. Department of Defense, including retired General Officers and Senior Executive Service members, each with many decades of experience.
